rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for all AGREE contract elements.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE.
Omit unsafe Boolean range clauses when port types are opaque or enumeration-like.
Distinguish between component type and implementation scopes for AGREE elements.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq declarations for range comparisons: eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Do not place assume/guarantee clauses in implementation scopes unless they are binding to subcomponents.
Do not mix Boolean and integer comparisons without explicit type alignment.
